case_title: PRESOLVE, LLC VS. CARLOS S CORTEZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-30-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-30-2019 CONTINUED TO SEP-17-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PRESOLVE, LLC A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CORTEZ, CARLOS S AN INDIVIDUAL $2,357.01 PRINCIPAL, $520.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $609.59 INTEREST, $315.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,801.60, SEE SCANNED DOC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF SEP-17-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
